name: Wander
short_description: Game vault where you can find numerous gamemodes to play. We have RTS Game where you buy units and defend your base, Arena brawl where you need to push others from platform and a Racing game. More games are in progress!
detailed_description:
SUMMARY

Wander is a series of games placed in one launcher. Here you will find as of moment 3 multiplayer games, each with their own genre, gamemodes, characters and maps. Overtime, more games and other content will be added as Wander continues to develop. The current games are:

Moonshine: Madness

A 2-8 player racing game where your main objective is to reach the finish line and slow down your opponents. You will be able to interact with environment and use several items that you can get through item boxes to gain advantage. The current map changes its terrain randomly so it doesn't look the same everytime. 

Moonshine: Brawl

A 2-6 player arena brawl where you have to push your enemies off the platform. You can in FFA, or make 2v2v2 / 3v3 teams. If you are missing enough players, you can fill the games with bots (they are not too smart yet but give it time and they will be much tougher to get rid of). The game drops a random effect that can be picked up by any player and use to their advantage. More maps with different effects are to be added.

Dominion: Unleashed

A currently 2 player RTS game (a 2v2 option is in progress) where one side fights as Humans against the other side, the Slimes. In this gamemode you can purchase buildings, workers and units to fight against your enemies. Not only that but you can fight along side your units and attack the enemy base yourself.

Features: 

Slime

  • Fast growing race that has low hp and income but has strenght in numbers.

  • Currently 3 units with 3 buildings.

  • Slow income that can be multiplied by large amount of workers.

Human

  • All rounders who are highly adaptable to any situation. While not dominating in any trait, their walls and tower can be used to gain an early advantage.

  • Currently 2 units with 2 buildings.

  • A blacksmith can be used to upgrade units for needed stats.

  • Medium income with not many workers, but those few can't be killed.

Join the adventure and explore all that Wander has to offer!
